channel.title: Hwaseonchoi on PrestaShop Developers' blog
channel.description: Recent content in Hwaseonchoi on PrestaShop Developers' blog

item.title: Hummingbird v2 now has an official public Figma file
item.description: Hummingbird v2 has been PrestaShop’s default theme since 9.1. If you’ve been building a child theme or customizing it, you may have been working from the code alone, or from an unofficial Figma file shared in the community. That changes today.
